hero.title: Your clinic, smarter
hero.description: With Mediflow, every detail of your clinic lives in one unified system: patient records, appointments, labs & imaging, smart prescriptions with drug interaction alerts, a voice AI assistant, a WhatsApp bot, and mobile apps for doctor and patient with push notifications.

booking.successDesc: We'll contact you shortly to confirm your appointment
